visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a movie poster for 'Dolittle' featuring Robert Downey Jr. and various animals including a polar bear, gorilla, and parrot. A small circular inset at the bottom right shows a middle-aged man with glasses and a grey flat cap talking. (2) The scene cuts to a medium close-up of the man, who is the main character. He is wearing a purple shirt, glasses, and a grey flat cap, speaking with animated hand gestures in an indoor office environment with soft lighting. (3) A shot of a Corgi dog looking up at the camera appears, followed by stylized text overlays in yellow and black. (4) The video transitions between the man talking and footage of the Corgi dog. Speech bubbles appear near the dog's head with Chinese text representing translated thoughts. (5) Graphic overlays depicting categories like pet care and wildlife conservation appear over the man as he continues to speak. (6) A Japanese flag icon and '2002' text are shown on screen as historical context. (7) A blue globe icon with '2017' text appears alongside the man. (8) The final phase shows the man looking upwards with an excited facial expression before the video ends.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @ 3ctim. [Subtitle]: 電影《杜立德醫生》. (2) [Variety]: 情節要成真了?. [Subtitle]: 百度近期申請一個專利. (3) [Subtitle]: 開發AI動物語言轉譯的系統. (4) [Variety]: 動物的情緒. [Subtitle]: 這套系統靠AI判讀動物的情緒. (5) [Subtitle]: 再翻譯成我們人類語句的系統. (6) [Variety]: 毛小孩的. [Variety]: 叫聲 動作 心跳 呼吸. [Subtitle]: 據了解這套系統會分析毛小孩的叫聲、動作、心跳、呼吸這些生理訊號. (7) [Subtitle]: 再透過生成的學習模型去判斷他當下的情緒. (8) [Variety]: 我餓了... [Variety]: 我很緊張... [Variety]: 我想出去玩. [Variety]: 我想上廁所. [Subtitle]: 例如：我餓了、我很緊張、我想出去玩，甚至我想上廁所. (9) [Subtitle]: 這雖然無法完全翻譯毛小孩的語言. (10) [Subtitle]: 但這項技術一樣被看好運用在. (11) [Variety]: 寵物照護 農業監控 野生動物保育. [Subtitle]: 寵物照護、農業監控，甚至於野生動物的一個保育. (12) [Subtitle]: 其實動物翻譯器這概念其實不是百度首創. (13) [Logo]: (Japan Flag). [Subtitle]: 早在2002年，日本有一個研發狗狗翻譯器. (14) [Subtitle]: 就被時代雜誌被評選為年度最佳發明之一. (15) [Subtitle]: 此外美國非營利組織地球物種計畫. (16) [Subtitle]: 它也自2017年成立以來，也致力於利用AI去解碼動物語言. (17) [Variety]: 動物語言. [Subtitle]: 不管怎麼樣啦，我超期待的.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian male with glasses, wearing a purple shirt and a grey flat cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A blurred indoor office or studio background with some equipment and soft lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy male narrator begins speaking in Traditional Chinese over a driving electronic BGM with a steady 4/4 beat. The vocal is clear and prominently mixed with high spectral brightness. (2) A quick 'ding' SFX punctuates the speaker's first question. The BGM features pulsating synthesizer pads and a sharp electronic snare. (3) Subtle 'whoosh' SFX accompany visual text transitions as the speaker details technical information. The vocal rate is brisk but well-articulated, typical of tech news delivery. (4) As the narration shifts to specific examples, a light digital click sound effect triggers. The acoustic environment remains clean and dry, resembling a treated studio space. (5) The music continues at a consistent volume underneath the vocals, providing a high-arousal bed for the commentary. (6) The video concludes with the narrator increasing his pitch and intensity to express personal excitement, followed by a rapid fade-out of both speech and music.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Technical Explanation -> Historical Context -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform viewers about the latest developments in AI-powered animal language translation technology, specifically mentioning a new patent by Baidu and historical precedents.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly engaging tech commentary video utilizing rapid editing and dense text overlays to maintain attention while delivering information about AI innovation.
